text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 147 

SRVC_LCTN_IND 

LABEL: Service Location Indicator 

DESCRIPTION: Indicator denoting if this is a service location address type for the provider. 

SHORT NAME: SRVC_LCTN_IND 

LONG NAME: SRVC_LCTN_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): APR Location 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 

COMMENT: There can be multiple records per
